---
title: Claude Code
description: Claude Code adapter outputs, config toggles, and sync behavior.
section: adapters
---

## Claude Code

The Claude adapter transforms Syntra's canonical `ai/` content into a Claude Code-ready configuration file.

## Generated files

When Claude sync runs, Syntra writes:

- `.claude/CLAUDE.md`

This generated file aggregates your Syntra instructions and agent guidance in Claude's expected location.

## Configuration

Claude behavior is controlled in `ai/config.yml`:

```yaml
adapters:
	claude:
		enabled: false
		instructionsMode: concatenated
```

| Key | Effect |
|---|---|
| `enabled` | If `true`, Claude output is included in default `syntra sync` |
| `instructionsMode` | Chooses instruction assembly strategy (`concatenated` or `individual`) before generation |

This project currently sets `adapters.claude.enabled: false`, so plain `syntra sync` skips `.claude/` output.

## Sync behavior

Use:

```bash
syntra sync --claude
```

or enable Claude and run:

```bash
syntra sync
```

<Callout variant="warning" title="Treat .claude output as generated">
	`.claude/CLAUDE.md` is generated artifact output. Edit `ai/` sources instead of editing this file directly.
</Callout>
